title: chrysanthemum pallasianum
intro: Chrysanthemum pallasianum, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum or Danggui, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum pallasianum include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and improving blood circulation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Chrysanthemum pallasianum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
